## Decision
REFINE

## Justification
While the core hypothesis regarding "Syntax-Induced Moral Aphasia" is theoretically innovative and compelling, the current experimental apparatus is fundamentally broken and yielding invalid data. The analysis quality rating is only 2/10, failing the minimum criteria to proceed.
